_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Among the statistically enriched pathways (Benjamini-Hochberg Adjusted p < 0.05) represented by the upregulated proteins were focal adhesion (18%, Fold enrichment (FE) 5)
details: Successfully identified statistically enriched pathways including focal adhesion (18%, FE 5), MAPK pathway (16%, FE 3), and regulation of actin cytoskeleton (12%, FE 3) with Benjamini-Hochberg Adjusted p < 0.05
